meta.title: DEF CON 2020 NYE - Hacker Jeopardy Tiebreaker - Church of Wifi vs Show&TELNET
meta.description: Did you miss the Hacker Jeopardy Tiebreaker event from the DEF CON New Year's Eve Party? Are you anxious to find out if Church of WiFi or Show&TELNET emerged victorious? Worry not, friend. We remembered to press 'Record'. Enjoy the festivities and pass it on.
